title: cyclosorus taprobanicus
intro: Cyclosorus taprobanicus, also known as the Ceylon fern, is a species of fern native to Sri Lanka and southern India. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyclosorus taprobanicus include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and providing relief from joint pain and arthritis. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion for herbal remedies, with the leaves and rhizomes being used to make tea, tinctures, or ointments.
